ul.li: Oscillation: Transition THROTTLING -> NORMAL with lag = 7k is ILLEGAL.
Concurrent: Multiple threads MUST use CAS on throttling flag.

g.title: System is operating within nominal lag parameters.
Backpressure active. High consumer lag detected.

div.p: Rationale: The 5,000 packet hysteresis band prevents state flapping at high frequency.
